programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX Swiss Open -Final Women's Doubles
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX German Open -Final Mixed Doubles
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 Orleans Masters Badminton 2026 presented by VICTOR -Final Mixed Doubles
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 Orleans Masters Badminton 2026 presented by VICTOR -Final Women's Singles

Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: Poo
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at Number 2s, and show you an experiment to make your own fake poo.

programme.title: Folded Paper, Hopping Frog
programme.desc: Can you turn a two-dimensional sheet of paper into a three-dimensional hopping frog? In this episode we explain the geometry behind paper folding and teach you how to create your own 3D aquarium! Crock, crock!

programme.title: Working Muscles and Strange Healing
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand experiment on their own muscles to show how they work. Dr. Chris checks maggots that are helping heal a wound, and Dr. Xand visits the emergency room to meet one patient who got grit stuck in his head, and another with a sore neck.

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 4: Hunters of the Deep
programme.desc: A group of young explorers are on a search for the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa. Today they are on the trail of a Great White Shark. From the research boat they spot a massive five-meter shark, one of the biggest ever seen at Bird Island.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Birthday Brainteaser
programme.desc: Addison fears that her family and friends have forgotten her birthday, so instead takes consolation in trying to solve a series of mysterious clues that take her on a wild goose chase all over Ayrton Park.

programme.title: The Maze
programme.desc: The Nektons find a mysterious underwater maze. When they enter it, they get trapped inside. And what's worse - they're not alone!

programme.title: Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: The Story of Sneeze
programme.desc: Dr.Chris and Dr. Xand show what happens when you sneeze. Dr. Chris shows a real human brain in the emergency room of the hospital, one patient has a hook caught in their hand and another thinks he's lost a toenail up his nose.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E1 - Desert-Adapted Elephant
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E15 - Fashion Special
programme.desc: Visit the Yves Saint Laurent museum and meet the great couturier. Somewhere between cinema and pop culture, Julien Fournie is deploying his art of haute couture on the red carpets. Jean Paul Gaultier invites Simone Rocha to revisit his archives. Micro or macro embroidery: Cyrielle Leclere steps outside the traditional framework.

programme.title: E13 - Eating Habits, Five Years After The Pandemic
programme.desc: Since 2020, several disruptions have changed the habits of consumers. What are they? Also: the flavors of maple, why we love sweet foods so much, culinary traditions around Ramadan.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers
programme.desc: The Paulin brothers grew up in Le Reposoir, a small village nestled in the heart of the Aravis, and each chose his own way to live the mountain to the extreme. One walks barefoot on a slackline stretched between two dizzying points, the other climbs the most demanding faces of the Mont-Blanc massif.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III-Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: E23 - Shops
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: E9 - Betty's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: E13 - Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E6 - Orangutans
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: E7 - Ship Parts Song
programme.desc: Captain Captain discovers that Sandy and Seaweed don't know any of the correct names for the parts of the ship, so she decides to teach them through a song!

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E22 - Alien Television
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: E5 - Crowning Around
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song

programme.title: E30 - Andy And The Sea Urchins
programme.desc: Andy blasts off on an aquatic adventure to California to see how kelp forests in the wild deal with urchins. Along the way, he meets a fish called a garibaldi and some sea otters.

programme.title: E27 - Go Jet Academy: Compass Navigators
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: E17 - Paisley Sea
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: E30 - Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: E7 - Middle Of The World City: Ecuador
programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.desc: Supertato's Tato belt gets locked inside a glass case for an exhibition, but Tomato can't remember the code to get it out again, and Supertato needs it back to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: E20 - Drum
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E84 - The Love/The Scam/The Awkwardness/The Nest/The Points
programme.desc: When Bobert finds he's infected with a virus called love.exe he asks Gumball and Darwin to give him a definition for the word 'love'. When they try to explain it through song, it gets him no closer to an answer, so he asks the other residents of Elmore to give their versions of what love means to them.

programme.title: E127 - Xingo/Cyber Slammers/Big In Japan/Don't Touch/Hole in 10
programme.desc: Ben is interested in a marathon of his favourite cartoon show, 'Spazz', but when Ben goes Upgrade to get a better signal, 'Spazz' leaps from his animated dimension, bringing chaos with him!

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/Party Pete/The Best Vhs In The World/Skips' Stress/Saving Time
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: E115 - Mystery On The Woohp Express
programme.desc: The Spies embark on the WOOHP EXPRESS with Zerlina, Blaine, Britney and Jerry to protect an uber important WOOHP device in a safe. But Zerlina disappears on the train and now everyone is a suspect as the Spies realize things are not what they seem.

programme.title: E103 - The Stayover/The Wrinklegruff Gals
programme.desc: After going overboard on the candy, Blossom and Buttercup wake up with no memory of last night and no idea where Bubbles is! They must piece together the events of last night and find Bubbles before the Professor gets back!

programme.title: E111 - Villain Time/Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: E84 - The Love/The Scam/The Awkwardness/The Nest/The Points
programme.desc: When Bobert finds he's infected with a virus called love.exe he asks Gumball and Darwin to give him a definition for the word 'love'. When they try to explain it through song, it gets him no closer to an answer, so he asks the other residents of Elmore to give their versions of what love means to them.

programme.title: E1390 - Original Idea/Attention To Detail/The Ranch/Tv Knight 9/A Stickier Situation
programme.desc: After Trigon proclaims the entire bookstore is his domain, Nana informs him that he has no control in the public domain.

programme.title: E103 - The Stayover/The Wrinklegruff Gals
programme.desc: After going overboard on the candy, Blossom and Buttercup wake up with no memory of last night and no idea where Bubbles is! They must piece together the events of last night and find Bubbles before the Professor gets back!

programme.title: E322 - Grandpa At The Playground
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E115 - The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Balloon Pups / Pups Save The Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger! // The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: E111 - Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: E215 - Pups Save A Friend / Pups Save A Stowaway
programme.desc: When Marshall decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol, the pups jump into action to bring him back! // When the pups find a stowaway on their trip to the Icy Tundra, they must rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat!

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Balloon Pups
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger!

programme.title: E212 - Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E823 - Super Potato Movie
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit the cinema for the first time to watch the Super Potato movie!

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned...

programme.title: E216 - Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: E615 - The Boingies!
programme.desc: When a bunch of adorable critters called Boingies get lost in Axle City, it's up to Blaze and AJ to gather them up and get them home safe and sound.

programme.title: E616 - Special Mission Blaze
programme.desc: When a nefarious villain steals every toothbrush in Axle City, Blaze's only chance at saving the day is to become: Special Mission Blaze!

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E216 - Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E806 - Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Who's To Blame For Cameroon's Woes?
programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Lala Kedarnath vows to marry off his four sisters before anything else, juggling family obligations and his chat shop, while putting his childhood crush, Sapna, on hold. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aanand L. Rai

programme.title: Salaam Venky
programme.desc: Venky suffers from a rare type of muscular dystrophy and wants to donate his organs. With his mother's support, he petitions for legalising euthanasia. Will his wish be granted in the court of law? Release Year: 2022 Director: Revathi

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Lala Kedarnath vows to marry off his four sisters before anything else, juggling family obligations and his chat shop, while putting his childhood crush, Sapna, on hold. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aanand L. Rai

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Lala Kedarnath vows to marry off his four sisters before anything else, juggling family obligations and his chat shop, while putting his childhood crush, Sapna, on hold. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aanand L. Rai

programme.title: Hong Kong Film Awards Preview: She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Set in a bustling alleyway during the Japanese occupation of Shanghai in the 1940s, the film centres on a wife, Zhan Zhou, who was being charged with the bloody dismemberment of her husband – a killing that seems impossible for her to have committed alone. The murder thrusts Zhan into the spotlight and the court of public opinion, forcing her towards a fate intertwined with that of her own country.

programme.title: A Beautiful Moment
programme.desc: An ageing bachelor playboy finally meets the girl of his dreams and proposes marriage, only to discover her psychologist stepmom was his first love long ago. The future in-laws initially pretend not to know each other but as the wedding date gets nearer, the rekindling of long-dormant feelings develops into a cross-generational love triangle.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Wildlife Wonders
programme.desc: Discover Earth Week wildlife wonders with Blippi! He meets Jabari the lion to learn how to roar & sneak in the savannah. Then, the BlippiMobile goes underwater to communicate with dolphins & get an ocean tour from a jellyfish! The wild adventures continue as Blippi meets a panda in the rainforest, jumps with a kangaroo in Australia & learns how bees make honey inside a hive!

programme.title: E9 - Protecting Animals For Earth Week
programme.desc: Join Baby John in protecting animals for Earth Week! The family takes a tour of the farm & helps out with the animals. Then, they visit the zoo to see lions, elephants & giraffes! The animal adventures continue with a trip to the reptile zoo & an underwater dive to see amazing sea creatures. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the Earth & plants a tree to make the world better!

programme.title: E10 - Exploring Nature For Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready for exploring nature for Earth Week! Baby John goes camping & overcomes his fear of the dark by looking at beautiful stars. Then, the family visits the Grand Canyon to see eagles & lizards! The nature fun continues with a trip to the lake for swimming & fishing. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the park & the family plants a tree to take care of the environment!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week City Clean Up
programme.desc: Join Morphle for an Earth Week city clean up! Mila & Morphle make a necklace out of recycled plastic, but the Bandits steal it! Then, they have to clean up the mess when Bubblebear makes painty bubbles all over town. The rescues continue as they help a stranded whale return to the sea, find homes for wild animals & round up escaped penguins!

programme.title: E4 - Magical Plants For Earth Week
programme.desc: Discover magical plants for Earth Week! Mila & Morphle water a thirsty flower & discover Shrubcub, a magic pet who makes a flowery jungle bloom! Then, they must save Pet Port when wayward vines take over. The magical adventures continue as Morphle morphs into a flying house to help animals find homes & shapes broccoli into a dinosaur that comes to life!

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - Magical Plants For Earth Week

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Wildlife Wonders
programme.desc: Discover Earth Week wildlife wonders with Blippi! He meets Jabari the lion to learn how to roar & sneak in the savannah. Then, the BlippiMobile goes underwater to communicate with dolphins & get an ocean tour from a jellyfish! The wild adventures continue as Blippi meets a panda in the rainforest, jumps with a kangaroo in Australia & learns how bees make honey inside a hive!

programme.title: E10 - Exploring Nature For Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready for exploring nature for Earth Week! Baby John goes camping & overcomes his fear of the dark by looking at beautiful stars. Then, the family visits the Grand Canyon to see eagles & lizards! The nature fun continues with a trip to the lake for swimming & fishing. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the park & the family plants a tree to take care of the environment!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week City Clean Up

Then, they have to clean up the mess when Bubblebear makes painty bubbles all over town. The rescues continue as they help a stranded whale return to the sea, find homes for wild animals & round up escaped penguins!

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!

programme.title: E7 - Pollen: Soon Everyone Allergic?
programme.desc: In the 1960s, 3% of French people were allergic to pollen, compared to 30% today. How to explain it? CO2 emissions, fine particles, pollen season, ragweed... Hugo Clement investigates. Fortunately, people across the country are fighting against allergenic plants.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Lee Lai Chun
programme.desc: Lee Lai Chun, a cinema goddess in the 1980s and 90s, has made her appearances in numerous Hong Kong movies. She seems to be a productive actress; but she admits that comparing to Carol ‘Dodo' Cheng or Sandra Ng who both has simultaneously worked on 9 film sets, doing 3 films at the same time for her is already exhausting enough. When she talks about the mode of filmmaking then and now, she misses and cherishes her family bonding with Tung Piu and Lydia Shum on the sets of the classic Lunar-New-Year series IT'S A MAD MAD MAD WORLD. Being in the film industry for over 30 years, though she has been awarded the Golden Horse Best Leading Actress, she regretfully says that she has not seen the birth of her own iconic role. Then, what does her ideal representative work looks like?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。
